basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Non Teaching Recruitment 2026- Apply Online for Accountant, Junior Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: IISER Pune Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026–27: Get latest IISER Pune recruitment notification 2026 (Advt. No. 23/2026) for 8 non-teaching vacancies including Assistant Registrar, Private Secretary, Physical Education Instructor (Female), Junior Hindi Translator, Accountant and Junior Office Assistant (Multi-Skill) posts in Pay Levels 4 to 10. The online application process is open and the last date to apply online through the official IISER Pune website www.iiserpune.ac.in is 12th May 2026. Find IISER Pune vacancies, detailed eligibility, post-wise age limits and salary details in the official n

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years (43 for Finance & Accounts, 48 for Private Secretary, 38 for Physical Education Instructor, 45 for Junior Hindi Translator, 38 for Accountant, 46 for Junior Office Assistant)
age_limit.details: Assistant Registrar (Stores & Purchase): Maximum 40 years Assistant Registrar (Finance & Accounts): Maximum 43 years Private Secretary: Maximum 48 years Physical Education Instructor (Female): Maximum 38 years Junior Hindi Translator: Maximum 45 years Accountant: Maximum 38 years Junior Office Assistant (Multi-Skill): Maximum 46 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree with 50% marks or equivalent grade in relevant field.
qualification.details: Assistant Registrar (Stores & Purchase): Master's Degree with 50% marks or equivalent grade. 7 years at Pay Level-6 OR 5 years at Pay Level-7 in handling Stores & Purchase matters as Superintendent / Section Officer / Private Secretary or equivalent post. Assistant Registrar (Finance & Accounts): Master's Degree with 50% marks or equivalent grade. 7 years at Pay Level-6 OR 5 years at Pay Level-7 in handling Finance & Accounts matters as Superintendent / Section Officer / Private Secretary or equivalent post. Private Secretary: Master's degree with 50% marks and excellent command over English language OR Master's degree with 50% marks and 5 years relevant experience as specified in job requirements in Govt. organizations at Pay Level-6. Physical Education Instructor (Female): A Master's Degree in Physical Education and Sports or Sports Science with first class (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale, wherever the grading system is followed). Diploma in coaching from NIS or from any equivalent Institute. Should qualify in the physical fitness test in accordance with the relevant Regulations of UGC as part of selection process. OR Master's Degree in Physical Education and Sports or Sports Science with first class (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale, wherever the grading system is followed). 5 years relevant experience as specified in job requirements in a Central / State Educational Institutes / Organizations of repute. Should have demonstrated meritorious performance in National or International level sports events for at least 2 times in the past 4 years. Record of having represented the university / college at the inter-university / inter-collegiate sports competitions or the State and / or national championships. Evidence of organizing sports competitions and conducting coaching camps of at least two weeks duration. Evidence of having produced good performance of team / athletes for competitions like state / national / inter-university / combined university, etc. Junior Hindi Translator: Master's degree of a recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level. OR At least 5 years' experience in office environment and typing skills in Hindi / English. Excellent computer skills for handling correspondence work / office files/ papers with proficiency in English & Hindi. Knowledge of translation work from Hindi to English and vice versa with Master's degree of a recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level. Accountant: Master's Degree with 50% in Commerce from a recognized University / Institute with excellent academic record. OR First class bachelor's degree in Commerce from a recognized University / Institute (OR) 5 years of experience at Pay Level-5 in the area or function in finance and accounts with Master's Degree in Commerce with 50% or equivalent grade or First-class bachelor's degree in Commerce from a recognized University or Institute. Junior Office Assistant (Multi-Skill): Bachelor's Degree with 50% in any discipline with excellent computer proficiency in Office Applications like Word, Excel, Power Point etc. OR Employees with 4 years relevant experience (as stated in job requirements) in office environment with Bachelor's Degree with 50% in any discipline with excellent computer proficiency in Office Applications like Word, Excel, Power Point etc.

salary_details.assistant registrar (stores & purchase): Pay Level -10 (Entry Pay ₹56,100/-), Total monthly emoluments ₹ 1,16,800/- (approx)
salary_details.assistant registrar (finance & accounts): Pay Level -10 (Entry Pay ₹56,100/-), Total monthly emoluments ₹ 1,16,800/- (approx)
salary_details.private secretary: Pay Level -7 (Entry Pay ₹44,900/-), Total monthly emoluments ₹90,100/- (approx)
salary_details.physical education instructor (female): Pay Level -7 (Entry Pay ₹44,900/-), Total monthly emoluments ₹90,100/- (approx)
salary_details.junior hindi translator: Pay Level -6 (Entry Pay 35,400/-), Total monthly emoluments ₹ 72,200/- (approx)
salary_details.accountant: Pay Level - 6 (Entry Pay 35,400/-), Total monthly emoluments ₹ 72,200/- (approx)
salary_details.junior office assistant (multi-skill): Pay Level - 4 (Entry Pay ₹25,500/-), Total monthly emoluments ₹ 53,600/- (approx)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISER Pune Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 is 12th May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for various non-teaching positions, including Assistant Registrar, Private Secretary, and others, in the IISER Pune Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Registrar post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Assistant Registrar post is a Master's Degree with 50% marks or an equivalent grade in a relevant field. Specific experience requirements may also apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Assistant Registrar (Stores & Purchase) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Registrar (Stores & Purchase) post is 40 years. Age relaxations may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Junior Office Assistant (Multi-Skill) post?
faq.answer: The Junior Office Assistant (Multi-Skill) post is offered at Pay Level 4, with an entry pay of ₹25,500/- and approximate total monthly emoluments of ₹53,600/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 typically includes a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and an Interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the IISER Pune Recruitment 2026. Candidates should verify this on the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Pune, Maharashtra. While candidates from other states can apply, they must meet all eligibility criteria. The job location will be IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website and fill out the application form before the last date.

faq.answer: The official notification PDF for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article or directly from the official website of IISER Pune.
